primary_focus: useSyncExternalStore for subscribing to browser APIs and external event sources

sync_external_store_signals.trigger: Requirement 2: Online Status card updates instantly
sync_external_store_signals.correct: Custom hook using useSyncExternalStore that subscribes to 'online'/'offline' window events and reads navigator.onLine as the snapshot
sync_external_store_signals.anti_pattern: useEffect + useState + addEventListener('online') / addEventListener('offline'). This works but is prone to tearing: the initial state might read navigator.onLine at a different time than when React commits, and there is no server-rendering snapshot.

sync_external_store_signals.trigger: Requirement 3: Viewport Size card updates on resize
sync_external_store_signals.correct: Custom hook using useSyncExternalStore that subscribes to 'resize' event and returns { width: window.innerWidth, height: window.innerHeight } as the snapshot
sync_external_store_signals.anti_pattern: useEffect + useState + addEventListener('resize'). The snapshot must return a stable reference for unchanged values (or React will re-render infinitely if returning a new object each time). An expert may return a string/tuple or memoize the snapshot.

sync_external_store_signals.signal: useSyncExternalStore for media queries (color scheme, reduced motion)
sync_external_store_signals.trigger: Requirements 4-5: Color Scheme and Reduced Motion cards update in real time
sync_external_store_signals.correct: Custom hook using useSyncExternalStore that calls window.matchMedia(query), subscribes via matchMedia.addEventListener('change', ...), and reads matchMedia.matches as the snapshot
sync_external_store_signals.anti_pattern: useEffect + useState + matchMedia.addEventListener. This pattern requires careful cleanup and is exactly the use case useSyncExternalStore was designed for.

sync_external_store_signals.trigger: Requirement 6: Document Visibility card updates on tab switch
sync_external_store_signals.correct: Custom hook using useSyncExternalStore subscribing to 'visibilitychange' on document, reading document.visibilityState as snapshot

sync_external_store_signals.trigger: Requirements 8-10: Notification feed shows events from the custom event bus
sync_external_store_signals.correct: useSyncExternalStore with subscribeToEventBus as the subscribe function and getEventBusSnapshot as the getSnapshot function. The event bus API is already designed with the subscribe + getSnapshot pattern that useSyncExternalStore expects.
sync_external_store_signals.anti_pattern: useEffect + useState subscribing to the event bus and manually managing the events array. This misses that the data-model already provides the exact API shape (subscribe + getSnapshot) that useSyncExternalStore consumes.

custom_hook_opportunities.name: useMediaQuery
custom_hook_opportunities.wraps: useSyncExternalStore for matchMedia — generic, reusable for both color scheme and reduced motion

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: filteredEvents
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Computed via useMemo from events and active type filters
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: Stored as separate state synced via useEffect

derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.name: eventCounts
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.correct: Derived from events array during render
derived_values_that_must_not_be_state.anti_pattern: Separate useState tracking counts, updated via useEffect

legitimate_effect_uses.purpose: Start/stop the event bus on mount/unmount
Interval timer for updating relative timestamps
legitimate_effect_uses.expected_pattern: useEffect with setInterval to trigger re-renders for 'X seconds ago' display, with proper cleanup

expected_components: StatusCard (reusable card for each status indicator)

accessibility_checkpoints: Status cards use aria-live or role='status' for live-updating values
Filter toggle buttons have aria-pressed attribute
Event type indicators are not color-only (include text labels)
Snapshot button is a proper <button> element
